description: Evaluation of industrial diagnostic skill — deterministic component testing with known ground truth data

evals.name: inspect_data_accuracy
evals.prompt: Use the industrial-deep-diagnostic skill to inspect the file evals/synthetic_known_data.csv. Run node inspect.mjs on it and verify the output correctly identifies: (1) timestamp as the time column, (2) stage as a string column, (3) all numeric columns (temp_a_c, temp_b_c, pressure_mpa, thickness_um, quality_index), (4) 30 total rows, (5) 7 total columns.
evals.expected_output: JSON with correct column type classification: 5 numeric, 1 datetime, 1 string; stage has 3 unique values; time column = timestamp

evals.name: stats_correlation_accuracy
evals.prompt: Use the industrial-deep-diagnostic skill to run statistical analysis on evals/synthetic_known_data.csv. Run stats.mjs to compute correlations and verify: (1) temp_a_c and temp_b_c have r > 0.95, (2) temp_a_c and pressure_mpa have r < -0.95, (3) temp_a_c and thickness_um have r < -0.95, (4) pressure_mpa and thickness_um have r > 0.95. Use temp_a_c and thickness_um as target columns.
evals.expected_output: Correlation matrix with expected relationships verified: temp_a↔temp_b ~+0.99, temp_a↔pressure ~-0.99, temp_a↔thickness ~-0.99, pressure↔thickness ~+0.99

evals.name: anomaly_detection_accuracy
evals.prompt: Use the industrial-deep-diagnostic skill to detect anomalies in evals/synthetic_known_data.csv. Run stats.mjs with thickness_um as the target column and verify that abnormal intervals are detected around rows 20-25 (timestamps ~08:20 to ~08:25) where the anomaly was injected.
evals.expected_output: Abnormal intervals detected in the 08:20-08:25 region, with at least one interval containing rows 20-24
